competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Khuliso Mudau.
Attempt blocked. Kim Min-Jae (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lee Kang-In with a cross.

events.description: 金玟哉射门被封堵。 李强仁参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lee Tae-Seok (Korea Republic).
Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Lee Tae-Seok.
Attempt blocked. Relebohile Mofokeng (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Kim Min-Jae.
Attempt missed. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box misses to the left. Assisted by Seol Young-Woo with a cross.

events.description: 吴贤揆射门偏出。 薛英佑参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Lee Tae-Seok.

events.description: 李强仁射门偏出。 李太锡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Evidence Makgopa (South Africa) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Aubrey Modiba with a cross.

events.description: 证据·马克戈帕射门偏出。 奥布里·莫迪巴参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lee Tae-Seok (Korea Republic).
Attempt blocked. Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Relebohile Mofokeng.

events.description: 塔佩洛·马塞科射门被封堵。 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Lee Gi-Hyuk.
Attempt saved. Oswin Appollis (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Mbekezeli Mbokazi.

events.description: 奥斯温·阿波利斯射正。 姆贝凯泽利·姆博卡齐参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, South Africa. Evidence Makgopa is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Relebohile Mofokeng.
Attempt saved. Thalente Mbatha (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic). Assisted by Thapelo Maseko.

events.description: 塔伦特·姆巴塔射正。 塔佩洛·马塞科参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Evidence Makgopa (South Africa) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kim Seung-Gyu (Korea Republic).
Seol Young-Woo (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Kim Min-Jae.

events.description: 黄希灿射门偏出。 金玟哉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Relebohile Mofokeng following a fast break.

events.description: 塔佩洛·马塞科射门偏出。 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Hwang Hee-Chan (Korea Republic).
Foul by Lee Gi-Hyuk (Korea Republic).
Attempt missed. Relebohile Mofokeng (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Ime Okon following a set piece situation.

events.description: 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯射门偏出。 伊梅·奥康参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Relebohile Mofokeng.

events.description: 塔佩洛·马塞科射门被封堵。 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, South Africa. Aubrey Modiba is caught offside.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, South Africa. Evidence Makgopa is caught offside.
Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Lee Tae-Seok.
Attempt missed. Aubrey Modiba (South Africa) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right following a corner.

events.description: 奥布里·莫迪巴射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, South Africa 0, Korea Republic 0.

events.description: 孙兴慜 登场，黄希灿 离场
金敬宇 登场，白胜浩 离场
卡斯特罗普·詹斯 登场，李太锡 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins South Africa 0, Korea Republic 0.
Attempt blocked. Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Relebohile Mofokeng.

events.description: 塔佩洛·马塞科射门被封堵。 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Thalente Mbatha (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Yaya Sithole.

events.description: 塔伦特·姆巴塔射门偏出。 斯佩菲罗-西特莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Seol Young-Woo (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Seol Young-Woo with a cross.

events.description: 吴贤揆射正。 薛英佑参与进攻。
哲邦·莫雷米 登场，奥斯温·阿波利斯 离场

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 塔佩洛·马塞科 进球，哲邦·莫雷米 助攻
朴镇燮 登场，金玟哉 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jens Castrop (Korea Republic).
Foul by Jens Castrop (Korea Republic).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 奥布里·莫迪巴 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 赵贵成 登场，吴贤揆 离场
伊克拉姆·雷纳斯 登场，塔佩洛·马塞科 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Aubrey Modiba.
Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Lee Han-Beom (Korea Republic).
Foul by Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic).

events.description: 杰登·亚当斯 登场，雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Tshepang Moremi (South Africa).
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Yaya Sithole.
Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Jayden Adams.
Attempt missed. Seol Young-Woo (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box is too high following a corner.
Foul by Jens Castrop (Korea Republic).
Attempt blocked. Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Kim Jin-Gyu.

events.description: 孙兴慜射门被封堵。 金敬宇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Korea Republic. Conceded by Yaya Sithole.
Attempt saved. Park Jin-Seob (Korea Republic) header from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the top left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Jens Castrop with a cross.

events.description: 朴镇燮射正。 卡斯特罗普·詹斯参与进攻。

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

h2h.reason: 暂未找到两队的历史交锋记录

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

dongqiudiSource.emptyReason: 懂球帝全量球队赛历未列出此前直接交锋

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
